metadata.title: Minimal Theme Settings
metadata.description: Change the colors, fonts and features of Minimal Theme.

regex.source: text:"To create a custom color scheme use the "
regex.target: text:"要创建自定义配色方案，请使用"

regex.source: text:"These options can also be defined on a per-file basis, see "
regex.target: text:"这些选项也可以根据每个文件的基础上自定义，详情请参阅"
.setName("资源导航图标 📁 和 🔍 标签化")
.setName("裁剪侧边栏中过长的文件名")

regex.source: .setDesc("Level of contrast between sidebar and main content.")
regex.target: .setDesc("侧边栏和主要内容之间的对比度。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Navigation items in the left sidebar uses text labels.")
regex.target: .setDesc("左侧边栏顶部的资源导航图标栏改为上下标签栏的形式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The top area of the app uses your accent color.")
regex.target: .setDesc("应用顶部窗口框使用外观设置里的主题色。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Active file and menu items use your accent color.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当前选中的文件和菜单项使用您设置的主题色。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Headings use a different color for each size.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每种尺寸的标题使用不同的颜色。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off to use full-width status bar.")
.setDesc("Use ellipses to fit file names on a single line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("使用省略号替代过长的文字部分使得文件名归于同一行上。")
.setDesc("显示工作区空间分隔线（如侧边栏与编辑器之间的分隔线）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Hide tab bar and status bar, hover to display. Can be toggled via hotkey.")
regex.target: .setDesc("隐藏标签栏和状态栏，悬停可显示。此特性可以通过热键切换。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Images and videos fill the width of the line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("图像和视频的宽度填满整行。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn consecutive images into columns \u2014 to make a new row, add an extra line break between images.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将连续图像转换为列\u2014以创建新行，在图像之间添加额外的换行符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Default width for table and Dataview blocks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("表格数据视图块的默认宽度。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Used for text in the sidebars and tabs (default 13).")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于侧边栏和选项卡中的文本（默认值13）。")
.setDesc("标准行宽每行所占字符数（默认值为40）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Number of characters per line for wide elements (default 50).")
regex.target: .setDesc("宽元素每行所占的字符数（默认值为50）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Percentage of space inside a pane that a line can fill (default 88).")
regex.target: .setDesc("一行文字能够填充编辑器横向空间的百分比（默认值为88）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Overrides the text font defined in Obsidian Appearance settings when in edit mode.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在编辑模式下，覆盖在obsidian外观(Appearance)设置中定义的文本字体。")
